channel.title: sdf on Analyst
channel.description: Recent content in sdf on Analyst

item.title: Memory Forensics
item.description: This is my course notes from SDF series, Memory Forensics, Part 1, 2 and SDF RAM Extraction Fundamentals.

item.title: Prefetch Forensics
item.description: This is my course notes from Prefetch forensics series. Tools WinPrefetchView To view pretech files (decompressed as well) in GUI.
